_comment: Smogon basename → PokeAPI default-form slug. Extracted from SmogonToTargetsMain per diary 067's aliases seam. When Smogon emits a basename (e.g. 'urshifu') that PokeAPI rejects without a form suffix, list the explicit default form here. Extend as new species surface; no code change needed if the name mapping is all that's new.
